# FixNGo — Verified Knowledge

(`../memory/entries.json`) after they were **verified** and at least **5 days old**.

promotion script move them here.

## Payments

- Verify Razorpay webhook signatures with the dedicated webhook secret (not the API key secret). Reject on mismatch before touching business logic. _(verified, promoted 2026-07-11, id: 2026-07-06-razorpay-webhook-secret)_
